node.content-desc: 蒲飞路巴士总站(公交站)

node.text: <font size="32">蒲飞路巴士<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>总站</font>(<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>公交站)</font></font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Pokfield Road Bus Terminus (Public Station)</font>
<font color='#5ABB9E'>2</font>条途径线路有实时公交信息
